banner: DRAFT — NOT SUBMITTED — review with a human before proceeding
scenario: Illustrative mock applicant: Wei Ling Tan, a Singapore Citizen registering a one-person sole proprietorship, 'Tan Digital Tuition Services', to provide private home tuition services. Applying with her own Singpass, residing in Singapore. All names, numbers, and identifiers are fabricated test data, not a real applicant's information.

eligibilityOutcome.summary: Eligible for self-service registration on Bizfile: has her own Singpass, and is not a foreign owner residing overseas requiring a local manager or a corporate service provider.

reasons.requirement: Must have Singpass to register directly (foreigners without Singpass must engage a corporate service provider)
reasons.sourceRef: Who can set up a sole proprietorship or partnership in Singapore

reasons.requirement: Must not be a foreign owner residing overseas (that path requires a local-manager appointment, out of scope)

fieldsNotApplicable.label: Secondary business activity — SSIC code
fieldsNotApplicable.reason: This scenario's business has a single business activity (private tuition); no secondary SSIC code is applicable.

fieldsNotApplicable.label: Custom description of business activity
fieldsNotApplicable.reason: The primary SSIC code's own industry name ('Other education n.e.c.') fully describes this scenario's business activity; no additional custom description is needed.

safetyNotice: This packet was assembled by an automated agent from a GovSchema document (sg/acra/sole-proprietorship-registration). GovSchema describes and verifies government processes; it does not submit them. No value in this packet has been transmitted to the Accounting and Corporate Regulatory Authority, Bizfile, or any government system. A human (the business owner) must review every value below, confirm it is correct, and explicitly authorize registration through Bizfile's own channel (bizfile.gov.sg, authenticated with their own Singpass) before this registration is submitted. This packet is not a government record and carries no legal effect on its own.
